findings.issue: user-spec.md is absent from Context Files. The template lists it as a mandatory feature-level context file alongside tech-spec.md and decisions.md. No user-spec.md exists in the feature folder (this is a bugfix feature without a formal user-spec), but the link should either be present or explicitly noted as not applicable.
findings.fix: If user-spec.md does not exist for this feature, omit the link or add a note. If it does exist, add [user-spec.md](../user-spec.md) to Context Files.

findings.issue: user-spec.md is absent from Context Files. Same issue as Task 1 — no user-spec.md exists in the feature folder, but the mandatory template link is missing.
findings.fix: Same as Task 1: omit or add a note if no user-spec exists for this feature.

findings.issue: user-spec.md is absent from Context Files. Same issue as Tasks 1 and 2.
user-spec.md is absent from Context Files. Same issue as Tasks 1, 2, and 3.

Context Files PK links use relative paths (../../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/...) while Tasks 2 and 3 use absolute paths (/home/claude/workspace/projects/geo-fix/.claude/...). Inconsistency within the batch. Relative paths in Task 1 and 4 are fragile if the task file is read from a different working directory.
findings.fix: Align all tasks to use either relative or absolute paths consistently. Absolute paths (as in Tasks 2 and 3) are safer for agent execution.

findings.issue: Same PK path inconsistency as Task 1 — uses relative ../../../.claude/... paths instead of absolute paths used by Tasks 2 and 3.
findings.fix: Change PK links to absolute paths: /home/claude/workspace/projects/geo-fix/.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/project.md, etc.

findings.issue: Tech-spec AC item 'In `_do_cleanup()`: if failures remain after retry, notify user (stderr + tray toast) about what couldn't be cleaned' is partially carried forward — the task AC says 'prints cleanup failure details to stderr' but does not mention the tray toast. The task body correctly explains tray toast is deferred (GeoFixTray.notify() not yet implemented), but the AC should reflect this explicitly rather than silently dropping it.
findings.fix: Add a note in the AC or Description that tray toast notification is deferred pending GeoFixTray.notify() implementation, so the omission is intentional and documented.

findings.issue: Round 1 major finding (implementation scope split from tech-spec) remains unresolved at the task level — the task description still states the implementation is already in place and only test coverage is the scope. This is factually accurate given the project state, but decisions.md does not exist on disk to document this deviation. The finding was acknowledged in R1 but no decisions.md has been created yet.
findings.fix: Create decisions.md in the feature folder and document that Tasks 1, 3, 4 cover test-only scope because implementation was completed in a prior session outside this task batch. This satisfies the carry-forward traceability requirement.

findings.issue: Same as Task 1: implementation-already-done scope split is accurately described in the task but decisions.md does not exist to document the deviation from tech-spec.
findings.fix: Same as Task 1: create decisions.md and document the scope split.

findings.issue: Same as Tasks 1 and 3: decisions.md does not exist on disk.
